title: On Target: 2021 Private Equity Outlook
content:
## On Target: 2021 Private Equity Outlook
Not unexpectedly in the bizarre year that was 2020, Canadian private equity slowed down a bit amidst COVID-related restrictions and uncertainty. There are nevertheless positive signs for the industry. In our 5th annual Private Equity Outlook, our PE team takes stock of the lessons learned in 2020 and identifies opportunities in 2021.
Learn more about trends to watch with our annual On Target: 2021 Private Equity Outlook.

### On Target: 2021 Private Equity Outlook
Not unexpectedly in the bizarre year that was 2020, Canadian private equity activity suffered a setback.

### About McCarthy Tétrault’s National Private Equity Group
Our Private Equity Group combines the strengths of several practice areas, including corporate/securities, investment funds, tax, finance, infrastructure, real estate and restructuring, across the firm’s offices in Canada, New York and London. The team offers diverse experience in all facets of private equity, including M&A, fund formation, fund investments, debt financing and other specialty investments.
